name: Uppsala County (Sweden)

colors.symbolism: the field of the Uppland arms

description: Square red flag charged at centre with the golden royal orb (riksäpple) surmounted by a cross.
history: The flag is the heraldic banner of the arms of Uppsala County, derived from the medieval coat of arms of the historic province of Uppland.

features.symbolism: the gules field of the historic Uppland provincial arms

features.role: the riksäpple (royal orb), surmounted by a cross
features.symbolism: the historic emblem of the province of Uppland; the orb represents the royal authority associated with Uppsala
